summary: Maximum-assimilation lifecycle fixes are covered by focused, full-project, and smoke quality gates.
findings: Evaluator-to-context projection closes the previous manual derived-report gap and requires passing raw-deletion evidence.
Shared YAML parsing and serialization prevent the first-index corruption and make lint/check diagnostics consistent.
CLI finalization, generated topology and coverage reports, aligned modalities, and regression coverage satisfy the approved scope.
evidence_refs: bun run test:project agentplane: 338 files, 1924 tests passed
